name: QA 273
description:
PCP QA Test No. 273

Increase testing code coverage in core parts of libpcp



Copyright (c) 2010 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
